headline.en: Turn market share and growth into portfolio choices
headline.zh: 把市场份额和增长率转成组合取舍

whyOpen.en: Use this when a portfolio debate needs data on market attractiveness and competitive position.
whyOpen.zh: 当组合讨论需要市场吸引力和竞争地位证据时使用。

audience.en: Teams comparing business units, products, brands, or geographies with comparable market data.
audience.zh: 适合比较业务单元、产品线、品牌或区域，并且有可比市场数据的团队。

firstSteps.en: Define comparable units before placing anything on the matrix.
firstSteps.zh: 先定义可比较单元，再放入矩阵。

firstSteps.en: Write the data source next to every placement.
firstSteps.zh: 每个位置旁边都写清数据来源。

outcomes.en: A portfolio action list: invest, select, harvest, reposition, or divest.
outcomes.zh: 一份组合动作清单：投入、选择、收割、重新定位或剥离。

commonMisreads.en: A quadrant label is not an automatic decision; it is a prompt for evidence, economics, and portfolio action.
commonMisreads.zh: 象限标签不是自动决策，而是引出证据、经济性和组合动作的提示。

commonMisreads.en: Market growth is not the same as profit-pool growth; a fast-growing market can still destroy cash.
commonMisreads.zh: 市场增长不等于利润池增长；高速增长市场也可能持续吞现金。

commonMisreads.en: Relative share only works when the market boundary and reference competitor are comparable.
commonMisreads.zh: 只有市场边界和参考竞争对手可比时，相对份额才有意义。

practicePrompts.en: Which quadrant placement would change if you used profit pool instead of revenue growth?
practicePrompts.zh: 如果用利润池而不是收入增长，哪个象限判断会改变？

portfolio-map.en: Use BCG Growth-Share Matrix for the market-growth/share lens; use Portfolio Map when innovation risk, disruption risk, and return movement are more important than market share alone.
portfolio-map.zh: BCG 增长份额矩阵用于市场增长率/相对份额视角；当创新风险、颠覆风险和收益变化比市场份额更重要时，回到业务组合地图。

business-model-canvas.en: Any business that receives invest, harvest, divest, or reposition action should be expanded into a BMC before committing resources.
business-model-canvas.zh: 任何需要投入、收割、剥离或重新定位的业务，在决策前都应展开为 BMC。

business-model-environment.en: Use environment signals to justify market-growth assumptions and to challenge whether a quadrant position is still valid.
business-model-environment.zh: 用商业模式环境信号证明市场增长假设，并挑战象限位置是否仍然成立。

description.en: A comparable business unit, product line, or brand to classify.
description.zh: 待分类的可比较业务单元、产品线或品牌。

description.en: Evidence for market growth, relative share, competitor position, or category maturity.
description.zh: 关于市场增长、相对份额、竞争地位或品类成熟度的证据。

description.en: Action to fund, scale, strengthen, or protect a position.
description.zh: 追加投入、扩张、强化或保护位置的动作。

description.en: Action to harvest cash, reduce investment, divest, or exit.
description.zh: 收割现金、减少投入、剥离或退出的动作。

description.en: Question about whether the unit should move, narrow, merge, or be reframed.
description.zh: 关于业务是否应迁移、聚焦、合并或重新定义的问题。
